products.title: 4‑in‑1 Inflatable Water Hammock Float
products.description:
Multi-Use Foam Hammock Seat for Pool

Meet the ultimate floating lounge: the Cococabana Pacific Blue Water Hammock Float. Crafted from ultra-durable, triple-dip vinyl-coated foam instead of inflatable plastic this 4-in-1 pool float is built for serious relaxation with zero hassle. Use it as a hammock, chair, saddle, or drifter thanks to its ergonomic design featuring two buoyant rolled ends and a flexible center that cradles your body while keeping you comfortably suspended in the water. 

This premium foam float requires no inflation, ever. The two rounded ends keep it afloat while the center dips just enough to cool you off in the pool or lake. Whether you’re drifting under the sun or catching up with friends poolside, the Cococabana Water Hammock Float offers a supportive, stable, and stylish way to chill.

With its sleek Pacific Blue color and textured vinyl surface, this float is made to resist sun, chlorine, and saltwater. It’s lightweight, quick to dry, and built to last season after season.

Key Features:

  • 4-in-1 functionality: use as hammock, chair, drifter, or saddle
  • Solid foam construction
  • Triple-dip vinyl coating for durability and easy cleaning
  • Ribbed texture adds style and grip
  • Two buoyant rolled ends support your head and legs
  • Stays afloat while keeping you cool and suspended

Color: Pacific Blue
Dimensions: Approx. 48” L x 24” W
Material: Closed-cell foam with vinyl coating
Recommended Use: Pool, lake, or resort lounging
Care Instructions: Rinse and air dry after use

products.title: 70” Foam Pool Float with Headrest
products.description:
Adult Float for Swimming Pools

Make every pool day feel like a vacation with the Cococabana 70" Foam Pool Float. Crafted from ultra-durable closed-cell foam and finished in a smooth vinyl coating, this luxury float is designed for serious relaxation. Its integrated headrest offers ergonomic support while you float, tan, or drift, and the generous 70-inch length gives you room to stretch out in style.

Available in vibrant Pacific Blue or tropical Key Lime, the Cococabana foam float is resistant to sun, chlorine, and saltwater — perfect for pools, lakes, and dockside lounging. It’s lightweight, ready to use out of the box, and easy to clean after long days in the sun. Whether you’re hosting a pool party or just soaking in the quiet, this float delivers comfort and style with zero inflation required. 

  • Vinyl-Coated Foam: Smooth, water-resistant, and easy to clean
  • Mid-Size Comfort: Measures 70 inches long by 25 inches wide—ideal for adults
  • Built-In Headrest: Supports the neck and shoulders for relaxed floating
  • Compact Profile: 1.25-inch thickness for lightweight portability
  • Vibrant Color Options: Available in Pacific Blue or Key Lime
  • Versatile Use: Perfect for pools, lakes, or dockside lounging
  • Durable Design: Closed-cell foam resists water absorption and sun damage

Versatile 3-in-1 Pool Lounger for Adults

Upgrade your summer float game with the Cococabana First Class Flat Foam Pool Noodle — the ultimate multi-use water lounger for adults. At 52 inches long and 11.5 inches wide, this oversized noodle offers comfortable support whether you’re sitting, laying flat, or leaning back to float in total relaxation.

Crafted from high-quality closed-cell foam and coated in a smooth, UV-resistant vinyl, this premium flat noodle resists damage from chlorine, salt water, and the sun. The ribbed texture adds grip and comfort while helping keep the noodle lightweight, buoyant, and quick to dry. Available in two vibrant colors — Pacific Blue and Key Lime — this pool float stands out on any deck, lake, or resort.

Unlike inflatable floats that deflate or tear, the Cococabana Flat Foam Noodle is ready to go out of the box and built to last season after season. Just toss it in the pool or bring it along to the lake — it’s the first-class way to float.

Key Features:

  • Float in 3 ways: sit, lay, or lean
  • Flat oversized design: 52" L x 11.5" W
  • Ribbed closed-cell foam for extra durability
  • Vinyl coating resists UV rays, chlorine, and salt water
  • Holds up to 250 lbs – ideal for adults
  • No inflation required
  • Color options: Pacific Blue or Key Lime
  • Perfect for pools, lakes, beaches, or docks
  • Lightweight, easy to rinse, and quick to dry

Whether you're catching sun or cruising the water, the Cococabana First Class Flat Foam Pool Noodle delivers comfort, style, and long-lasting performance for your summer adventures.

pages.title: Cococabana Company
pages.bodyHtml:
Our Company

At Cococabana, we believe your pool should be more than just a place to swim—it should be your personal escape. That’s why we design luxury foam pool floats that deliver unmatched comfort, durability, and style for today’s discerning pool owners.

Unlike traditional inflatables, our premium foam pool loungers are crafted from high-density, closed-cell foam that resists punctures, absorbs minimal water, and offers superior buoyancy. No need to inflate, patch, or worry—just grab your float and unwind. From sleek minimalist pool pads to oversized floating loungers, each piece is made to elevate your backyard pool experience with effortless elegance.

Our floats are not only functional—they’re beautiful. With a curated palette of modern, resort-inspired colors and clean silhouettes, Cococabana floats complement any outdoor pool decor. Whether you’re sunbathing, entertaining guests, or enjoying a quiet morning float, our products help turn your pool into a luxury retreat.

Join thousands of homeowners and pool lovers who trust Cococabana for their poolside lifestyle. Experience the ultimate in foam float comfort, built to last and designed to impress.

Cococabana — where pool time meets luxury, one float at a time.

pages.title: Cococabana Terms of Service – Premium | Cococabana Life
pages.bodyHtml:
PRIVACY STATEMENT

----

SECTION 1 - WHAT DO WE DO WITH YOUR INFORMATION?

When you purchase something from our store, as part of the buying and selling process, we collect the personal information you give us such as your name, address and email address.
When you browse our store, we also automatically receive your computer’s internet protocol (IP) address in order to provide us with information that helps us learn about your browser and operating system.
Email marketing (if applicable): With your permission, we may send you emails about our store, new products and other updates.

SECTION 2 - CONSENT

How do you get my consent?
When you provide us with personal information to complete a transaction, verify your credit card, place an order, arrange for a delivery or return a purchase, we imply that you consent to our collecting it and using it for that specific reason only.
If we ask for your personal information for a secondary reason, like marketing, we will either ask you directly for your expressed consent, or provide you with an opportunity to say no.

How do I withdraw my consent?
If after you opt-in, you change your mind, you may withdraw your consent for us to contact you, for the continued collection, use or disclosure of your information, at anytime, by contacting us at therevolab@gmail.com or mailing us at:
hautedoorliving
16200 Ventura Boulevard, 310 A Los Angeles California US 91436

SECTION 3 - DISCLOSURE

We may disclose your personal information if we are required by law to do so or if you violate our Terms of Service.

SECTION 4 - SHOPIFY

Our store is hosted on Shopify Inc. They provide us with the online e-commerce platform that allows us to sell our products and services to you.
Your data is stored through Shopify’s data storage, databases and the general Shopify application. They store your data on a secure server behind a firewall.

Payment:
If you choose a direct payment gateway to complete your purchase, then Shopify stores your credit card data. It is encrypted through the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI-DSS). Your purchase transaction data is stored only as long as is necessary to complete your purchase transaction. After that is complete, your purchase transaction information is deleted.
All direct payment gateways adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover.
PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of credit card information by our store and its service providers.
For more insight, you may also want to read Shopify’s Terms of Service (https://www.shopify.com/legal/terms) or Privacy Statement (https://www.shopify.com/legal/privacy).

SECTION 5 - THIRD-PARTY SERVICES

In general, the third-party providers used by us will only collect, use and disclose your information to the extent necessary to allow them to perform the services they provide to us.
However, certain third-party service providers, such as payment gateways and other payment transaction processors, have their own privacy policies in respect to the information we are required to provide to them for your purchase-related transactions.
For these providers, we recommend that you read their privacy policies so you can understand the manner in which your personal information will be handled by these providers.
In particular, remember that certain providers may be located in or have facilities that are located a different jurisdiction than either you or us. So if you elect to proceed with a transaction that involves the services of a third-party service provider, then your information may become subject to the laws of the jurisdiction(s) in which that service provider or its facilities are located.

Once you leave our store’s website or are redirected to a third-party website or application, you are no longer governed by this Privacy Policy or our website’s Terms of Service.

Links
When you click on links on our store, they may direct you away from our site. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of other sites and encourage you to read their privacy statements.

SECTION 6 - SECURITY

To protect your personal information, we take reasonable precautions and follow industry best practices to make sure it is not inappropriately lost, misused, accessed, disclosed, altered or destroyed.
If you provide us with your credit card information, the information is encrypted using secure socket layer technology (SSL) and stored with a AES-256 encryption. Although no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, we follow all PCI-DSS requirements and implement additional generally accepted industry standards.

SECTION 7 - COOKIES

Here is a list of cookies that we use. We’ve listed them here so you that you can choose if you want to opt-out of cookies or not.
_session_id, unique token, sessional, Allows Shopify to store information about your session (referrer, landing page, etc).
_shopify_visit, no data held, Persistent for 30 minutes from the last visit, Used by our website provider’s internal stats tracker to record the number of visits
_shopify_uniq, no data held, expires midnight (relative to the visitor) of the next day, Counts the number of visits to a store by a single customer.
cart, unique token, persistent for 2 weeks, Stores information about the contents of your cart.
_secure_session_id, unique token, sessional
storefront_digest, unique token, indefinite If the shop has a password, this is used to determine if the current visitor has access.


SECTION 8 - AGE OF CONSENT

By using this site, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your state or province of residence, or that you are the age of majority in your state or province of residence and you have given us your consent to allow any of your minor dependents to use this site.

SECTION 9 - CHANGES TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY

We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time, so please review it frequently. Changes and clarifications will take effect immediately upon their posting on the website. If we make material changes to this policy, we will notify you here that it has been updated, so that you are aware of what information we collect, how we use it, and under what circumstances, if any, we use and/or disclose it.
If our store is acquired or merged with another company, your information may be transferred to the new owners so that we may continue to sell products to you.

QUESTIONS AND CONTACT INFORMATION

pages.bodyHtml:
Return & Refund Policy

You have 30 days from the date of purchase to return your item. To qualify, the product must be in brand new, unused condition and in its original packaging.

To begin a return, email customerservice@cococabanalife.com to request a return label. We cover the return shipping cost. A 10% restocking fee will apply.

Once we receive and inspect your return, your refund will be issued to the original payment method within 2 business days.

For any questions, email customerservice@cococabanalife.com
